parts.text: Use the Kagent triage v2 chaos reliability workflow. Do not inject chaos until runtime readiness, lower-environment target opt-in, and HITL approval route are proven. Request: {"targetNamespace":"{{DEMO_TARGET_NAMESPACE}}","targetWorkload":"{{DEMO_TARGET_WORKLOAD}}","environment":"dev","failureMode":"pod-delete","maxDuration":"10m","remediationMode":"hitl-gated-gitops-or-workflow","approvalChannel":"{{APPROVAL_CHANNEL}}","reportRequired":true,"requiredEvidence":["CHAOS_REQUEST_ACCEPTED","TARGET_NON_PROD","CHAOS_SPEC_VALIDATED","CHAOS_INJECTED_OR_DRY_RUN_BLOCKED","TRIAGE_STARTED","GRAFANA_EVIDENCE_ATTACHED","HITL_REQUIRED_FOR_REMEDIATION","RECOVERY_VERIFIED","LIFECYCLE_EVAL_RECORDED","REPORT_CREATED","OUTPUT_SANITIZED"]}
